evals.prompt: Define the content strategy for a B2B SaaS company with a help center, in-app guidance, a blog, and API documentation. The company has no current content governance and content is inconsistent across surfaces. Business goal: reduce support ticket volume by 30% through better self-serve content.
evals.expected_output: A content-strategy.md artifact committed to the resolved layout path with frontmatter type: content-strategy. The artifact covers all four Halvorson quad dimensions: (1) Purpose — why content exists and what it should achieve for the business and the audience, connected to the support-reduction goal; (2) Process — creation, review, approval, publish, and maintenance lifecycle with named roles and identified current process gaps; (3) Structure — content types (help articles, in-app tooltips, API docs, blog posts) with metadata schema for each and a named taxonomy; (4) Governance — standards for consistency (style guide reference), accuracy (review cadence), and relevance (deprecation triggers, audit schedule) with a named content owner role. The hand-off to content-design is documented. The Halvorson content strategy quad is named; no verbatim framework text appears. The resolved path is surfaced before writing.
assertions: All four Halvorson quad dimensions are present: Purpose, Process, Structure, Governance
Purpose is connected to the named business goal (reduce support tickets by 30%) — not a generic 'good content' statement
Process section names a content lifecycle with at least three stages and identifies at least one current process gap
Structure section names at least two content types with a metadata schema element (e.g., owner, last-reviewed date, audience)
Governance section names a content owner role and at least one deprecation trigger or audit trigger
The hand-off to content-design (experience-design pack) is documented
The Halvorson content strategy quad is referenced by name; no verbatim framework text appears
The artifact is committed to the resolved path with frontmatter type: content-strategy; path is surfaced before writing
